reason: Suffix-matches FairyDragon (Elphidran), but Anthony is certain he has NOT killed Elphidran and this flag went true right around a confirmed Chillet (WeaselDragon) kill -- suspected mislabeled spawner (note: 'Chillet???', not fully confirmed).
